response.original_title: 断り切れずヤラせちゃう女子アナ しかも無自覚な着衣巨乳Lカップがヤリモクほいほい
response.overview: Kimura Ako is a gentle and charming TV announcer. Known for her warm personality and her impressive L-cup figure, she appears on morning programs wearing tight knit outfits that emphasize her chest, inevitably drawing the attention of male viewers. Because she is kindhearted and struggles to refuse requests, her striking figure attracts attention no matter what she wears. Men who notice her curves often convince themselves she must be tempting them. Whether in the studio or out on the street, her mere presence has a powerful effect. Her elegant demeanor as a professional announcer, combined with an understated sensuality, seems to trigger strong reactions from the men around her. Behind the wholesome “morning show face” lies a far more provocative side. Under pressure from those around her, Ako often finds herself unable to firmly refuse their advances.
response.title: A Female Announcer Who Ends up Letting Men Have Sex with Her Because She Can’t Say No and Her Unknowingly Tempting Clothed L-Cup Big Breasts Keep Attracting Men Who Only Want Sex

titles.title: Kotowari kirezu yara se chau joshi-ana shikamo mujikakuna chakui kyonyū L kappu ga yarimoku ho i ho i
